ddls:
CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "client_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "sex" TEXT /* Gender of the customer (e.g., 'm' for male, 'f' for female) */,
  "birth_year" INTEGER /* Birth year of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the customer */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date when the customer registered */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("client_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sessions" (
  "session_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each session */,
  "client_id" TEXT /* ID of the customer associated with the session */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the session started */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the session ended */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used for the session */,
  "browser" TEXT /* Browser used for the session */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address used for the session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sessions_client_id FOREIGN KEY ("client_id") REFERENCES customers ("client_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the product */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the product */,
  "stock_quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product in stock */,
  "brand" TEXT /* Brand of the product */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the product */,
  "dimensions" TEXT /* Dimensions of the product */,
  "rating" REAL /* Average customer rating of the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_views" (
  "view_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product view */,
  "product_id" TEXT /* ID of the product being viewed */,
  "session_id" TEXT /* ID of the session during which the product was viewed */,
  "view_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the product was viewed */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the product view in seconds */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the product view (e.g., search, recommendation) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("view_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_views_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_views_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES sessions ("session_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "purchases" (
  "purchase_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each purchase */,
  "product_id" TEXT /* ID of the product being purchased */,
  "session_id" TEXT /* ID of the session during which the purchase was made */,
  "purchase_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the purchase was made */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product purchased */,
  "total_price" REAL /* Total price of the purchase */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment used for the purchase */,
  "shipping_address" TEXT /* Address where the product is shipped */,
  "coupon_code" TEXT /* Coupon code used for the purchase */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("purchase_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_purchases_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES sessions ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_purchases_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_engagement" (
  "engagement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each engagement activity */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of engagement (e.g., 'view', 'click', 'purchase') */,
  "product_id" TEXT /* ID of the product involved in the engagement */,
  "session_id" TEXT /* ID of the session during which the engagement occurred */,
  "engagement_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the engagement occurred */,
  "details" TEXT /* Additional details about the engagement */,
  "engagement_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the engagement in seconds */,
  "interaction_type" TEXT /* Type of interaction (e.g., hover, scroll) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("engagement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_engagement_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_engagement_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES sessions ("session_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, analyst, customer) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
